description: A deterministic fallback and recovery system for autonomous agents handling failures, retries, degraded modes, and escalation paths.

error_packet.description: Structured error information including code, message, and metadata.

retry_policy.description: Rules defining how and when retries should occur.

degraded_modes.description: Fallback modes the agent can enter when full functionality is unavailable.

escalation_rules.description: Conditions for escalating errors to other agents or systems.

workflow.action: Agent classifies the error based on severity and metadata.
Agent retries the operation according to the retry policy.
If retries fail, agent enters a deterministic degraded mode.
If conditions are met, agent escalates the error to another system.
Protocol returns a machine-readable recovery summary.
